objective: Design and implement the full Y-OS multi-agent coordination system with registry, memory, context assembly and orchestration pipeline

execution_sequence.action: Decompose mission and assign sub-tasks to agents
Design architecture and specifications for: Design and implement the full Y-OS multi-agent coordination
Review all deliverables against success criteria and validate

delegation_plan: Mission classified as Advanced (Execution-heavy). COO coordinates 5 agents in structured sequence. Architect validates design before Developer builds. COO reviews all deliverables before final delivery.
review_requirements: All deliverables must match success criteria defined in Mission Pack
Architecture review by Architect Agent before implementation
COO final validation before delivery to user
No Architecture Freeze v1 violations (9 core modules, no new modules)
escalation_conditions: Capability not found in Y-REG → Escalate to agent--strategist (Y-CAP gap analysis)
Agent fails step 3 times → Escalate to COO for workflow redesign
Module bypass attempt detected → Escalate to Human (Architecture Freeze violation)
expected_deliverables: Mission objective achieved: Design and implement the full Y-OS multi-agent coordination system with registry, memory, context as
Deliverables reviewed and validated by COO Agent
No unresolved blockers or open issues
